hero.headline:
Building Digital Trust.
One Website at a Time.
hero.subHeadline: We craft, maintain, and optimize professional websites for hospitals, educational institutions, and growing businesses — ensuring your digital presence is as reliable as the services you provide.

story.headline: From Frustration to Foundation
paragraphs: We started CrossTech after watching too many critical organizations — hospitals, schools, local services — struggle with broken, outdated, or hard-to-manage websites. We realized that for these organizations, a website isn't just a marketing tool; it's essential infrastructure.

Today, we focus on building digital foundations that simply work. Fast loading times, clear navigation, robust security, and ongoing support so our clients can focus on their actual work, not on wrestling with their website.

timeline.text: Recognized the gap in reliable web services for essential businesses and institutions.
Began offering specialized redesigns focused on accessibility and core web vitals.
Introduced comprehensive long-term maintenance plans to ensure ongoing security.
Trusted by organizations that rely on their digital presence 24/7.

purpose.headline: Why We Build
purpose.subText: We believe that essential organizations deserve digital infrastructure they can rely on implicitly.

mission.statement: To provide hospitals, schools, and service businesses with fast, secure, and accessible websites that serve their communities effectively.

vision.statement: To be the trusted digital partner that organizations turn to when they need a website that works as hard as they do.

coreValues.headline: The Standards We Uphold
coreValues.subText: Our work is defined by a commitment to reliability, clarity, and long-term partnership.

items.title: Reliability First
items.description: If a patient needs to find hospital hours, the site must load instantly. We build for absolute uptime.

items.title: Clarity over Clutter
items.description: We design for the user. No confusing navigation or unnecessary animations that block information.

items.title: Uncompromising Security
items.description: We implement strict security protocols and continuous monitoring to keep your organization safe.

items.title: Radical Transparency
items.description: No hidden maintenance fees or confusing tech jargon. We explain exactly what we're doing and why.

items.title: Accessibility for All
items.description: We build to strict WCAG standards, ensuring your website is usable by everyone in your community.

items.title: Long-Term Partnership
items.description: We don't just launch and leave. We are here to maintain, update, and protect your site for years.

capabilities.headline: End-to-End Digital Care
capabilities.subText: From the first line of code to ongoing daily backups, we handle the technical heavy lifting.

testimonial.quote: CrossTech took our outdated, slow hospital website and turned it into a fast, secure, and incredibly easy-to-use resource for our patients. Their ongoing support means we never worry about downtime.
testimonial.author: Dr. James Miller
